$meta.formula: dmg = base * MagicPower/100 * (1 + PyromanticPower/100); special effects scale (MP+PP)/100 additively
$meta.desc_note: VERBATIM game data (0.9.4.x). Damage formulas evaluate with current Magic Power (MP) and Pyromantic Power (PYR).

skills.desc: Three firebolts, each 6 Fire Damage at 85% Accuracy. +30% damage vs Burning targets.
skills.dyn:
Shoots three fire bolts, each dealing {6*(1+(PYR-100)/100)*MP/100} Fire Damage (Spell Accuracy -10%).

Fire bolts deal 30% more damage to Burning targets.

skills.desc:
Grants -10% Abilities Energy Cost for 3 turns each time an enemy within Vision is Ignited.

Dealing repeated Fire Damage with the ability tree's spells is more effective at Igniting targets.

Grants +2.5% Pyromantic Power for each Burning tile or enemy within Vision.

Doubles the bonus for each adjacent Burning tile or enemy.

Grants +33% Fire Resistance. Receiving Fire Damage puts this bonus on a 6 turn cooldown.
12 Fire Damage to all adjacent tiles, Ignites empty ones. 40% Ignite 2-3 turns, -5% Fire Res 10 turns. +15% Pyromantic Power 4 turns per affected enemy.
skills.dyn:
Deals {12*(1+(PYR-100)/100)*MP/100} Fire Damage to all adjacent tiles, Igniting the empty ones.

With {40*(MP+PYR)/200}% chance Ignites all affected targets for 2-3 turns and applies them with -{5*(MP+PYR)/200}% Fire Resistance for 10 turns.

Grants +15% Pyromantic Power for 4 turns for each affected enemy.

skills.desc:
Hitting a Burning target with a firebolt from "Fire Barrage" applies it with -5% Fire Resistance for 3 turns and prolongs the duration of Burning by 1 turn.

The effect stacks up to 3 times.
13 Fire Damage to large area within 3 tiles, Ignites some tiles. Burns targets' Energy for 200% of damage. Tree cooldowns -1 per affected enemy.
skills.dyn:
Deals {13*(1+(PYR-100)/100)*MP/100} Fire Damage to a large area within 3 tiles, Igniting some of the tiles in it.

Burns the affected targets' Energy for 200% of the damage dealt.

Reduces the ability tree's cooldowns by 1 turn for each affected enemy.

skills.desc: 6 Fire Damage to 3x3, creates magma puddles 3 turns: 3 Fire per turn, -5% Fire Res 7 turns (stacks), 5% Ignite (+5% per turn in magma).
skills.dyn:
Deals {6*(1+(PYR-100)/100)*MP/100} Fire Damage to a 3x3 tile area, creating magma puddles within it and Igniting some of the tiles.

Magma persists for {3*(MP+PYR)/200} turns. Remaining in magma deals {3*(1+(PYR-100)/100)*MP/100} Fire Damage, applies with -5% Fire Resistance for 7 turns (the effect stacks), and has 5% chance to Ignite for 3-4 turns.

Each turn of remaining in the magma increases the Ignition chance by 5%.

skills.desc:
Using the ability tree's spells applies all enemies within 5 tiles with -5% Fire Resistance and -5% Max Health for 8 turns.

The effect stacks up to 4 times.
Removes Burning from target: 9 Fire Damage to 3x3, 20% Ignite 3-4 turns. Each removed Burning turn: +30% damage, +100% Ignite chance.
skills.dyn:
Removes Burning from the target, dealing {9*(1+(PYR-100)/100)*MP/100} Fire Damage to a 3x3 tile area and with {20*(MP+PYR)/200}% chance Igniting all affected targets for 3-4 turns.

Each turn of removed Burning increases the damage by 30% and the chance to Ignite by 100%.

skills.desc:
Grants +1 Range to "Fire Barrage", "Melting Ray", "Incineration", "Magma Rain", and "Inferno" if there are no enemies within 5 tiles.

Grants +5% Pyromantic Power and +3% Miracle Chance for each enemy within 5 tiles.
Ray: 5 Fire Damage to all in path, 14% Ignite 3-4 turns; explodes at target: 8 Fire Damage to 3x3, +20% per enemy passed through.
skills.dyn:
Shoots a fiery ray towards the targeted tile, dealing {5*(1+(PYR-100)/100)*MP/100} Fire Damage to all targets in its path and with {14*(MP+PYR)/200}% chance Igniting them for 3-4 turns.

The ray explodes in the targeted tile, Igniting it and dealing {8*(1+(PYR-100)/100)*MP/100} Fire Damage to a 3x3 tile area.

The explosion's damage increases by 20% for each enemy the ray passes through.

skills.desc:
Killing enemies with the ability tree's spells grants +20% Pyromantic Power to the next spell.

The effect stacks up to 3 times.

Increases the duration of every Burning caused by dealing Fire Damage and the ability tree's spells by 33%.
Firestorm 5x5 for 3 turns: 9 Fire Damage per turn inside, +15% per target in area.
skills.dyn:
Creates a firestorm in a 5x5 tile area, which persists for 3 turns.

Remaining in the firestorm deals {9*(1+(PYR-100)/100)*MP/100} Fire Damage.

The firestorm's damage increases by 15% for each target within the spell's area of effect.

skills.desc: Grants +20% Energy Restoration, -10% Cooldowns Duration, and -10% Backfire Chance for each Burning enemy within Vision.
